texto: That's how it goes these days, huh? Moving forward at the sounds of horns on highways, at the cue of traffic signals, turnstiles, tollbooths, ushered and rushed to the next stop on the itinerary, and there are days on the commuter train in the winter when it's got dark early and you can't see out because of the reflection and you might put down your paper or put aside your book and really look at yourself, because amid the noise and the smoke and the strangers and what's become of your life: there you are.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Wilton Barnhardt que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “That's how it goes these days, huh? Moving forward at the sounds of horns on highways, at the cue…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, reflection, there, com foco em dia-chuvoso e reflexao-noturna.
